properties.remark: WASHOUTS ON BAYLOR CANYON AND DRIPPING SPRINGS ROADS EAST OF LAS CRUCES ALONG THE BASE OF THE ORGAN MOUNTAINS.
FLOODING ALONG MONTANA AVENUE/US 62-180 EAST OF EL PASO.
HOUSE FLOODING IN EAST EL PASO...NO SPECIFIC DETAILS AVAILABLE. FROM EL PASO COUNTY CENTRAL DISPATCH.
TV MEDIA REPORTS 9 WATER RESCUES IN/AROUND THE CITY THIS EVENING.
TV MEDIA REPORTS 4 HOUSES FLOODED IN CITY OF EL PASO... SPECIFIC DETAILS WERE NOT AVAILABLE.
BAPTIST CHURCH LOST HALF OF ITS ROOF.
NUMEROUS TREES DOWN NEAR DEL VALLE HIGH SCHOOL. WINDS ESTIMATED OVER 60 MPH.
NICKEL SIZED HAIL...WITH QUARTER-SIZED MIXED IN NEAR THE WEED CAFE.
QUARTER AND NICKEL SIZED HAIL NEAR JUNCTION OF US 82 AND NM HIGHWAY 130. MOSTLY NICKELS WITH QUARTERS MIXED IN.
MESCALERO FIRE DEPT. REPORTS WATER AND MUD COVERING IR-10. BULLDOZER WERE SENT TO CLEAR THE ROAD.
POVERTY CREEK FIRE CHIEF REPORTED THREE INCHES OF WATER ACROSS STATE HIGHWAY 59 IN THE TOWN OF POVERTY CREEK.
NEAR PUTNAM ELEMENTARY SCHOOL ON WEST SIDE OF EL PASO. HAIL LASTED FOR 12 MINUTES...ENDING AT 347 PM MDT.
WATER OVER LOOP 375 AND DEL VALLE ON THE EAST SIDE.
TXDOT REPORTS WATER OVER MONTANA AT I-10.
FLOODING WITH CARS STRANDED IN LAS PALOMAS AREA...JUST SOUTH OF WILLIAMSBURG.
AT LEAST FIVE HOMES INUNDATED BY FLOOD WATERS.
ARROYO OVERFLOW CLOSING PART OF I-10 AT EASTLAKE BLVD IN FAR EAST EL PASO. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON MEDIA REPORTS.
NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZED HAIL ON THE EAST MESA.
HOMES FLOODED NEAR PEACHTREE HILL IN THE CASIA AREA...BETWEEN LAS CRUCES AND ORGAN NORTH OF US HIGHWAY 70.
2 TO 3 FEET OF WATER ON THE US-70 FRONTAGE ROAD ON THE EAST MESA...CARS STUCK.
52 KNOT...60 MPH GUST AT THE BORDER PATROL AEROSTAT SITE SSW OF DEMING.
HAIL SIZE VARIED FROM DIME TO QUARTER SIZE
QUARTER TO HALF DOLLAR SIZED HAIL
1 INCH HAIL REPORTED AT EL PASO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT
REPORTED FROM MONTWOOD AND YARBOROUGH
REPORT NEAR LOOP 375 AND ALAMEDA
REPORTED SEVERE STORM WAS CONTINUING TO PROCEED SOUTHEAST, FOLLOWING I-10. A LOT OF GOLF BALL SIZED HAIL WITH CONSIDERABLE VEHICLE DAMAGE. ARROYOS RUNNING FULL.
ALSO 0.54 INCHES OF RAIN IN 50 MINUTES.
NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZED HAIL. ALSO 1 INCH OF RAIN IN 30 MINUTES.
MEASURED NORTHWEST WIND GUST TO 62 MPH OR 54 KNOTS IN FAR NORTHEAST EL PASO.
WATER/ROCKS ACROSS MLK DR AT URBIBE...NORTH HILLS IN FAR NORTHEAST EL PASO. ALSO MEASURED 1.45 INCHES RAIN.
FAR NORTHEAST EL PASO...DIANA DRIVE CLOSED OFF AT KENWORTHY DUE TO FLOODING...ROCKSLIDE ON EAST SIDE OF TRANSMOUNTAIN ROAD/LOOP 375.
MEASURED PEAK WIND GUST AT AGUIRRE SPRINGS ON EAST SLOPES OF THE ORGAN MOUNTAINS.
